title: Add Photo Ai to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Photo Ai](https://apps.apple.com/pk/app/photo-ai-image-generator/id6759615194) to image
- Use Pollination Api to generate or process photos in Photo Ai.

Fixes #10380

gist.headline: Photo AI joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: The iOS app Photo AI just landed in our community showcase! It's always amazing to see developers building pocket-sized magic with our image API.
gist.summary: Added the iOS application 'Photo AI' to the community apps showcase and greenhouse documentation.
gist.impact: Community members can discover Photo AI in the ecosystem, highlighting a new real-world mobile integration of the Pollinations image API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a greenhouse holding a smartphone that displays a photo, representing the new iOS app 'Photo AI' joining the community greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny beret, holding a small smartphone that displays a glowing landscape photo. She is hovering inside a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
